controls.label: Does your business have a Customer Due Diligence — Associations process?
controls.remediation: Your organisation does not have a Customer Due Diligence — Associations process in place. You must establish a documented Customer Due Diligence — Associations process to meet your AML/CTF obligations. Review the controls below and implement the required procedures before completing this assessment.

controls.label: Does your AML/CTF program include risk-based systems and controls to be reasonably satisfied that: (a) the association exists, and (b) the names of any governing committee members have been provided when a customer notifies you that it is an association?
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure for associations does not include adequate risk-based systems and controls to verify that the association exists and that governing committee member names have been provided. Implement systems and controls designed to satisfy yourself about these matters before commencing a designated service for any association customer, as required under rules 4.6.2, 4.6.2(1), and 4.6.2(2).

controls.label: Does your procedure collect the following minimum KYC information for incorporated associations: (a) full name, (b) principal place of administration or registered office address (or public officer/president/secretary/treasurer residential address), (c) unique identifying number upon incorporation, and (d) full names of chairman, secretary, and treasurer or equivalent officers?

items.label: Principal place of administration or registered office address
Residential address of public officer, president, secretary, or treasurer

checklist-items.label: Unique identifying number issued upon incorporation
Full names of chairman, secretary, and treasurer (or equivalent officers)

controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not collect the minimum required information for incorporated associations. Update your procedure to collect: full name of the association, principal place of administration or registered office address (or residential address of the public officer or equivalent), unique incorporation number, and full names of the chairman, secretary, and treasurer or equivalent officers, as required under rules 4.6.3(1)(a)–(d).

controls.label: Does your procedure collect the following minimum KYC information for unincorporated associations: (a) full name of the association, (b) principal place of administration address, (c) full names of chairman, secretary, and treasurer or equivalent officers, and (d) the information required for the member as an individual customer?

checklist-items.label: Principal place of administration address (if any)
Full names of chairman, secretary, and treasurer (or equivalent officers)
Individual customer identification information for the member (as required under applicable individual CIP)

controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not collect the minimum required information for unincorporated associations and their members. Update your procedure to collect: full name of the association, principal place of administration address, full names of the chairman, secretary, and treasurer or equivalent officers, and all required individual customer information for the member, as required under rules 4.6.3(2)(a)–(d).

controls.label: Does your AML/CTF program include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether additional KYC information beyond the minimum specified in rule 4.6.3 should be collected for associations?
controls.remediation: Your AML/CTF program does not include risk-based systems and controls to assess whether additional KYC information is needed for association customers beyond the minimum prescribed fields. Implement a risk-based assessment process to determine whether further information collection is warranted, as required under rule 4.6.4.

controls.label: Does your procedure verify the full name and unique incorporating number for incorporated associations using information from ASIC, the relevant State/Territory/overseas body, the rules or constitution, certified copies, reliable and independent documents, or reliable and independent electronic data?

checklist-items.label: Full name of the incorporated association verified
Unique identifying number issued upon incorporation verified

controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure for incorporated associations does not verify the full name and unique incorporation number using the prescribed sources (ASIC, State/Territory/overseas bodies, rules or constitution, certified documents, or reliable independent sources). Update your verification procedure to confirm both the full association name and incorporation number from these sources before commencing a designated service, as required under rules 4.6.5(1)(a) and (b).

controls.label: Does your procedure verify the full name of unincorporated associations from the rules or constitution (or certified copies), reliable and independent documents, or reliable and independent electronic data, and verify member information in accordance with your individual customer identification procedure?

checklist-items.label: Full name of the unincorporated association verified from appropriate sources
Member information verified in accordance with individual customer identification procedure

controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure for unincorporated associations does not adequately verify the association name and member information using the prescribed sources and methods. Update your procedure to verify the association name from the rules or constitution or reliable independent sources, and verify member information according to your individual customer identification procedure, as required under rules 4.6.5(2)(a) and (b).

controls.label: Does your AML/CTF program include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether and to what extent additional KYC information collected in respect of associations should be verified?
controls.remediation: Your AML/CTF program does not include risk-based systems and controls to assess whether additional KYC information collected for associations requires verification. Implement a risk-based verification assessment process to determine the scope of verification for additional information beyond the minimum prescribed fields, as required under rule 4.6.6.

controls.label: Does your procedure require that verification of information about associations be based on: (a) constitution or rules (or certified copies), (b) minutes of meeting (or certified copies), (c) ASIC or State/Territory/overseas body information (for incorporated associations), (d) reliable and independent documents, (e) reliable and independent electronic data, or (f) a combination of these sources?

items.label: Constitution or rules of the association (or certified copy/extract)
ASIC or State/Territory/overseas body information (for incorporated associations)
Reliable and independent documents relating to the association
A combination of the above sources

controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not specify the acceptable sources for verifying information about associations. Update your procedure to require that all verification be based on at least one of the prescribed sources: constitution or rules, meeting minutes, ASIC/regulatory body information (for incorporated associations), reliable and independent documents, reliable and independent electronic data, or a combination thereof, as required under rule 4.6.7.

controls.label: Does your procedure allow use of disclosure certificates to verify information about associations where the information is not otherwise reasonably available from the sources in rule 4.6.7, and the certificate is used for risk-based additional verification purposes?
controls.detail-label: Explain how and when your organisation uses disclosure certificates for association verification
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not include a safe-harbour mechanism for using disclosure certificates to verify association information when other sources are not reasonably available. Update your procedure to permit disclosure certificates where verification is needed for risk-based additional information purposes and standard sources are unavailable, as provided under rules 4.6.8(1) and (2).

controls.label: Does your AML/CTF program include appropriate risk-based systems and controls to respond to discrepancies arising during verification of association information so that you can determine whether you are reasonably satisfied about the existence of the association and the provision of governing committee member names?
controls.detail-label: Describe your process for identifying and resolving discrepancies in association information
controls.remediation: Your AML/CTF program does not include adequate risk-based systems and controls to manage discrepancies discovered during association verification. Implement a documented process to identify, escalate, and resolve discrepancies in a way that allows you to make a final determination about whether the association exists and governing committee names have been properly provided, as required under rule 4.6.9.

groups.title: Process Confirmation
groups.description: Before answering the detailed compliance questions, confirm whether your organisation operates this business process.

groups.title: General CDD Obligation for Associations
groups.description: Risk-based systems and controls to verify association existence and governing committee information.

groups.title: Collection of KYC Information — Incorporated Associations
groups.description: Minimum KYC information to be collected for incorporated associations including name, address, incorporation number, and officer details.

groups.title: Collection of KYC Information — Unincorporated Associations
groups.description: Minimum KYC information to be collected for unincorporated associations and their members, including association name, address, officer details, and member individual information.

groups.title: Additional KYC Assessment
groups.description: Risk-based determination of whether to collect and verify additional KYC information beyond the minimum prescribed fields.

groups.title: Verification of Information — Incorporated Associations
groups.description: Verification of the association name and unique incorporation number using prescribed sources.

groups.title: Verification of Information — Unincorporated Associations
groups.description: Verification of the association name and member information for unincorporated associations.

groups.title: Approved Methods of Verification
groups.description: The prescribed documents and data sources that may be used to verify association information.

groups.title: Safe Harbour — Disclosure Certificates
groups.description: Use of disclosure certificates as an alternative verification source when standard sources are not reasonably available for risk-based additional information.

groups.title: Responding to Discrepancies
groups.description: Risk-based systems and controls to respond to discrepancies in association information verification.
